news.title: Awarded NSF CAREER Grant
news.description: Received the NSF CAREER Award (#2342187, $650,000 over five years) for 'Interpretable Foundations for Trustworthy AI Systems.' The NSF CAREER Award is the National Science Foundation's most prestigious award for early-career faculty.

news.title: ICML 2025 Paper Accepted
news.description: 'Causal Representation Learning with Structural Invariance' (with Jae-Won Kim and Arjun Patel) accepted to ICML 2025. Camera-ready version and code available in April 2025.

news.title: Keynote at NeurIPS Workshop on Trustworthy ML
news.description: Delivered an invited keynote at the NeurIPS 2024 Workshop on Trustworthy Machine Learning in Vancouver, presenting recent results on causal representation learning and its implications for robust generalisation.

news.title: Northfield University Excellence in Research Award
news.description: Received the annual Northfield University Excellence in Research Award, recognising outstanding research contributions by a faculty member in the natural sciences and engineering.

news.title: Papers Published at KDD 2024 and VLDB 2024
news.description: 'Beyond SHAP: Causal Explanations for Black-Box Models' published at KDD 2024; 'Scalable Data Valuation for Collaborative Machine Learning' published in the VLDB Endowment.

news.title: Appointed Associate Editor at JMLR
news.description: Appointed as Associate Editor for the Journal of Machine Learning Research (JMLR), one of the primary open-access venues for fundamental machine learning research.

news.title: Best Paper Honourable Mention at ICLR 2023
news.description: 'Robustness Certificates for Neural Networks via Interval Bound Propagation' received an Honourable Mention for Best Paper at ICLR 2023.

news.title: DARPA GARD Renewal
news.description: Northfield University's share of the DARPA Guaranteeing AI Robustness Against Deception (GARD) programme renewed with $820,000 in additional funding through 2026.

news.title: NeurIPS 2022 Paper Accepted
news.description: 'Fairness-Aware Learning with Causal Constraints' accepted to NeurIPS 2022, introducing primal-dual training algorithms for enforcing path-specific causal fairness conditions.

news.title: Named to AI's 40 Under 40
news.description: Named to the inaugural 'AI's 40 Under 40' list by Science & Technology Review, recognising leading researchers under the age of 40 making significant contributions to artificial intelligence.
